name: The SandTrap
about: The SandTrap is an indoor golf center located in Casper, Wyoming, featuring 7 golfing suites with 78 available courses. The facility is equipped with AboutGolf simulators endorsed by the PGA, offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. They provide various services including league play, event hosting, pro shop amenities, and online tee time booking. The venue emphasizes a casual, welcoming atmosphere suitable for both casual rounds and competitive league play.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-endorsed AboutGolf simulators with realistic shot tracking
Early bird rates for budget-friendly morning sessions
Comprehensive league program with competitive match play
On-site pro shop for club services and memberships

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows outside food and beverages
BYOB policy allows outside alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA-endorsed simulators featured on The Golf Channel

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can use your own clubs, the facility is equipped with simulator technology that tracks shots without requiring clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, The SandTrap operates on a BYOB policy, allowing you to bring your own food and alcoholic beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately 3 hours to complete 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is The SandTrap kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers for practice and league play.
